package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "sync"
)

// Negative scenario for shared_slice_append_race: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: goroutines appending to a shared slice without synchronization
type CaseSharedSliceAppendRaceDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSharedSliceAppendRaceModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSharedSliceAppendRaceRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSharedSliceAppendRaceModel
}

type CaseSharedSliceAppendRaceService struct {
    repo *CaseSharedSliceAppendRaceRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSharedSliceAppendRaceAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeSharedSliceAppendRace(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSharedSliceAppendRaceDTO) error {
    focus := "shared_slice_append_race"
    _ = focus
    shared := map[string]string{}
    var mu sync.Mutex
    mu.Lock(); shared[input] = input; mu.Unlock()
    shared_slice_append_race_negative := map[string]int{"shared": 1, "slice": 2, "append": 3, "race": 4}
    shared_slice_append_race_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    shared_negative_0 := shared_slice_append_race_negative["shared"] + len(input)
    _ = shared_negative_0
    slice_negative_1 := shared_slice_append_race_negative["slice"] + len(input)
    _ = slice_negative_1
    append_negative_2 := shared_slice_append_race_negative["append"] + len(input)
    _ = append_negative_2
    race_negative_3 := shared_slice_append_race_negative["race"] + len(input)
    _ = race_negative_3
    return nil
}
